name: Peanut Butter Kiss Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer bowl, cream together the peanut butter, butter, and brown sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla; beat well. Blend in the flour and 3/4 cup of chopped peanuts.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into a greased 9x9-inch square pan. Sprinkle the remaining peanuts on top.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Remove from the oven and immediately press the Hershey kisses onto the top. Allow space for cutting into bars.
6. Cool completely. Remove from the pan.
